text_block_list.text: One morning, as I'm heading to my office...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This is a robot training method that appeared in Cyborg Warrior Robomin.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Temporary interruption in memory confirmed. I
believe I dozed off for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The cause is most likely due to repeated
late-night viewings of the aforementioned show.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe that the calculated movements of the
robot will serve as a good reference for my
training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, in order to finish all five seasons, I will
require over six more months of viewing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I will work hard on this as part of my training.

Mihono Bourbon sleepily continues her robot
show-inspired training.
